strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and engineering depth
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Aisha Okonkwo) but all links and content point to 'Szabo Bogdan' — potential identity mismatch
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in work experience despite being core requirements
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Aisha has deep, diverse full-stack experience with core stack components (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS) and rare AI-agent work, making her a strong technical fit. However, the disconnect between her named identity and all digital profiles raises red flags about authenticity or data integrity, and missing explicit mentions of Nest.js/Vitest are concerning. Her open-source contributions and architectural thinking compensate significantly, but the identity issue requires clarification.
